channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Trump praises Ohio State Buckeyes during football title ceremony at White House
item.description: President Donald Trump sang high praise for the Ohio State Buckeyes during their national title celebration at the White House on Monday afternoon.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Yankees' Aaron Judge to be US captain at 2026 World Baseball Classic
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Appointed U.S. captain for next year's World Baseball Classic, Aaron Judge will be playing for more than himself and his teammates. “It’s something special getting a chance to represent our country,” the New York Yankees star said after manager Mark DeRosa's announcement Monday.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Date, time announced for Detroit Pistons vs. Knicks first-round playoff game
item.description: The NBA regular season has come to a close, but 16 teams, including the Detroit Pistons, are still alive in their quest to secure the Larry O’Brien Championship Trophy.
item.dc:creator: Brandon Carr, Local 4

item.title: Denver Nuggets boss Josh Kroenke says firings of coach and GM were months in the making
item.description: DENVER (AP) — Denver Nuggets boss Josh Kroenke said Monday that he twice balked at firing the winningest coach in franchise history and the general manager who connected the final pieces of the team's only championship puzzle before finally canning them last week with just three games left in the se
item.dc:creator: ARNIE STAPLETON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Trump receives praise from WWE icon for ability to generate heat
item.description: WWE chief content officer Paul Levesque praised President Donald Trump's ability to generate heat and get "under people's skin" amid his rise to the White House.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Penn State hockey goalie signs NHL contract
item.description: (WHTM) - Penn State men's hockey goalie Arsenii Sergeev has signed a two-year entry-level contract with the NHL's Calgary Flames. Sergeev is the 12th Nittany Lion to have signed an NHL deal. The signing comes after Penn State lost in the semifinals of the Frozen Four to Boston University.
item.dc:creator: George Stockburger, PHL 17

item.title: Hawks' Risacher enters play-in as the last man standing from French players to top last 2 NBA drafts
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — Atlanta Hawks rookie Zaccharie Risacher is the lone survivor of the influx of French players who have dominated the top of the last two NBA drafts. Risacher and the Hawks will play at Orlando on Tuesday night in the NBA play-in tournament.
item.dc:creator: CHARLES ODUM, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: US-based Original Six Red Wings, Rangers, Bruins, Blackhawks eliminated from playoffs for 1st time
item.description: The Original Six teams based in the United States have a rich history, combining to hoist the Stanley Cup 27 times. And now, they share an unwanted distinction. Detroit, Boston, Chicago and the New York Rangers will all miss the playoffs in the same year for the first time in NHL history.
item.dc:creator: LARRY LAGE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Phoenix Suns fire coach Mike Budenholzer after one dismal season with high-priced roster
item.description: PHOENIX (AP) — The Phoenix Suns have parted ways with veteran coach Mike Budenholzer following one dismal season that featured a fast start before a maddening slide out of postseason contention for a high-priced roster that included Kevin Durant, Devin Booker and Bradley Beal.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: WWE boss pulls back curtain on John Cena heel turn ahead of WrestleMania 41
item.description: WWE's Chief Content Officer Paul Levesque opened about the behind-the-scenes talks with John Cena about turning him heel in a podcast interview.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Patrick Reed stuns himself in Masters final round with eagle on 17th hole
item.description: Patrick Reed finished in third place at the Masters on Sunday, but it was his shot on 17 that stunned everyone, including himself. Reed asked whether the ball went in.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jazz close out season with 116-105 loss at Minnesota
item.description: MINNEAPOLIS (ABC4 Sports) - The NBA season has mercifully come to an end for the Utah Jazz. The Jazz ended the worst season in franchise history with a 116-105 loss to the Minnesota Timberwolves, who were led by Anthony Edwards with 43 points.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Palou finally loses as IndyCar champ's 2-race winning streak snapped by Kirkwood in Long Beach
item.description: Kyle Kirkwood showed that Alex Palou can be beat this IndyCar season and returned Andretti Global to the top of the podium with his second career victory at the Grand Prix of Long Beach.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Warriors' playoff seeding set after loss against Clippers in regular-season finale
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- The Golden State Warriors' playoff path is set. They will play in the NBA Play-In Tournament following a home overtime loss to the Los Angeles Clippers in Sunday's regular-season finale. With the loss, the Warriors will face the Memphis Grizzlies on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4

item.title: Bulls get ready for NBA play-in game with 122-102 win over 76ers in regular-season finale
item.description: Kevin Huerter hit five 3-pointers and scored 18 points and the Chicago Bulls warmed-up for the play-in game with a 122-102 win over the Philadelphia 76ers on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Report: Cubs' Justin Steele to undergo elbow surgery, done for the season
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — The Chicago Cubs were dealt a heavy blow on the injury front Sunday evening. All-Star starting pitcher Justin Steele is done for the season, according to the Chicago Sun-Times.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Kyren Lacy, former LSU star wide receiver and NFL hopeful, dead at 24
item.description: Former LSU star wide receiver Kyren Lacy, 24, has died amid an investigation into a fatal car crash in December. He was found dead in Houston.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 89th Masters Tournament
item.description: Roars for Rory. The famous sound of Sunday at the Masters Tournament could be for Rory McIlroy (-12) this year.
item.dc:creator: John Hart, WGN 9

item.title: Utah scores four power play goals in 5-3 victory
item.description: DALLAS (AP) - Logan Cooley had a goal and two assists to lead the Utah Hockey Club to a 5-3 win against the Dallas Stars at American Airlines Center on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Western Michigan wins its 1st Frozen Four hockey title, beating Boston University 6-2
item.description: Owen Michaels didn’t hesitate after watching his shot slide into the open net with more than two minutes left to essentially seal Western Michigan’s first Frozen Four title in its first championship game.
item.dc:creator: JOHN WAWROW, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Fan reaches into Mike Trout's glove to snatch a catch from Angels outfielder
item.description: A fan grabbed the ball out of Mike Trout's glove after the Los Angeles Angels star reached into the right field stands Saturday night to make what appeared to be a great catch against the Houston Astros
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Kansas man who was falsely accused of being a shooter after Chiefs’ 2024 Super Bowl win has died
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — A Kansas man who was falsely accused of being among the shooters who opened fire at a rally celebrating the Kansas City Chiefs’ Super Bowl victory last year has died, his attorney said. Denton Loudermill Jr.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Tampa Bay Rowdies dismiss head coach ahead of home opener
item.description: A spokesperson for the Tampa Bay Rowdies announced Friday that the club has relieved head coach Robbie Neilson of his duties.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Tucker, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Utah falls in shootout in home finale, 4-3
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - In the final game at the Delta Center in their inaugural season, the Utah Hockey Club lost a thriller in a shootout to the Nashville Predators Thursday night, 4-3.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Bulls favored to land Nikola Jokic if traded, odds maker says
item.description: If the Denver Nuggets were to trade Nikola Jokic, the Chicago Bulls are the top landing spot according to Bookies.com's Adam Thompson, who gave the Bulls a +500 odds to acquire the 3-time NBA MVP.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Swanson hits tiebreaking single in 4-run eighth as the Cubs beat the Rangers 10-6
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Dansby Swanson lined a tiebreaking two-run single in Chicago's four-run eighth inning, and the Cubs beat the Texas Rangers 10-6 on Tuesday on another frigid night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Jaylon Johnson wants to see real accountability before he says the Bears have changed for the better
item.description: Jaylon Johnson is heading into his sixth NFL season and third go-around riding Chicago's head coaching carousel, and is excited to see the positive change that has eluded them since he joined the franchise, and is looking forward to the Bears' fresh start with new head coach Ben Johnson.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Loyola University Chicago sent preservation notice tied to federally indicted ex-Michigan coach
item.description: Loyola University Chicago has received a preservation notice from attorneys representing a former student-athlete, compelling the school to preserve evidence related to the indictment of former Michigan football assistant coach Matt Weiss on unauthorized computer access and identity theft charges.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: 49ers star’s high school retired his jersey
item.description: (KRON) – For the first time, a Colorado high school has retired a jersey for one of its former students. That alum was none other than San Francisco 49ers star Christian McCaffrey. Valor Christian High School recently retired McCaffrey’s No.
item.dc:creator: Jordan Baker, KRON4

item.title: 89th Masters Tournament
item.description: After Masters week began with a day of rain on Monday, Augusta National Golf Club was bathed in sunshine for Tuesday's practice round.
item.dc:creator: John Hart, Fox 5

item.title: Egor Demin leaves BYU for NBA Draft
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - BYU standout point guard Egor Demin has decided to leave BYU after one season and declare for the NBA Draft. Demin made the announcement at a press conference held at the school Tuesday morning.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Retzlaff poised for another big year at BYU
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Last season, BYU quarterback Jake Retzlaff threw for almost 3,000 yards, 20 touchdowns, while rushing for over 400 yards and six TD's as the Cougars shocked everyone with an 11-2 season.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Tickets to the Salt Lake Bees new stadium will cost you more than they used to
item.description: The Salt Lake Bees are playing their first game at the new ballpark in South Jordan tomorrow, though fans of the team might notice that prices are a little different than Smith's Ballpark.
item.dc:creator: Sorina Trauntvein, ABC 4
